title: elaeagnus pungens f. angustifolia
intro: Elaeagnus pungens f. angustifolia, also known as the silverthorn or Russian silverberry, is a deciduous shrub native to Russia and Eastern Asia, characterized by its narrow leaves and silvery undersides. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as eleagnine and elaeocarpusin. The health benefits of Elaeagnus pungens f. angustifolia are said to include reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
